content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat     Help     Ways to bank with us     Cash Exchange Machines   Cash Exchange Machines   Exchange notes for smaller denominations of notes or coins without having to queue at a branch.    What you can do at our Cash Exchange Machines    NAB Cash Exchange Machines allow personal and business customers to exchange notes for a combination of lower value notes and coins, saving you time by not having to wait to be served. It’s a quick and secure way to get the notes and coins you need.    Denomination options   Denomination options    Denominations (coins and notes) Value per roll Quantity per roll  5c $2 40 coins  10c $4 40 coins  20c $4 20 coins  50c $10 20 coins  $1 $20 20 coins  $2 $50 25 coins  $5 - -  $10 - -  $20 - -    How to use Cash Exchange Machines    To use a Cash Exchange Machine, you’ll need a NAB debit card, credit card, deposit-only card or quick-change card. The process is simple. Insert the card and follow the machine prompts which will ask you to insert the cash you wish to exchange and to select the denomination of coins and notes you’re looking for.    Don’t have a card yet?    You’ll get a choice between two feature-packed cards   Linked to the funds available in your Classic Banking account, our Visa Debit cards offer security and convenience. Whether you’re travelling overseas, buying something or shopping at your local supermarket, pay with Visa Debit and enjoy the benefits.    Find out more   Where can I find a Cash Exchange Machine?    Cash Exchange Machines are available at many branches across Australia. You can use our location tool to find your closest machine and when you can access it.    Other self-service machines    Save time and explore more convenient ways to bank with us using a self-service machine near you.    Coin Deposit Machines   Deposit loose coins securely into your account without having to queue at a branch.    Express Business Deposit Machines   Deposit cash and coin securely into your account via an Express Business Deposit (EBD) bag and cheques via an Express Cheque Deposit (ECD) envelope without having to queue at a branch.   Business Express Machines   Deposit cash and coin securely into your account via an Express Business Deposit (EBD) bag and cheques via an Express Cheque Deposit (ECD) envelope, and exchange notes for smaller denominations of notes or coins without having to queue at a branch.   More ways to bank with us    Explore more convenient ways to pay bills, withdraw funds, pay on the go, bank in person or save time doing your personal and business banking online.    More ways to bank with us    Important information    This section contains Important Information relevant to the page you are viewing, but you can't see it because you have JavaScript disabled on your browser. Please enable JavaScript and come back so you can see the complete page. It's important that you read the Important Information in this section before acting on any information on this page.
